overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through an industrial district. The player emerges from under a concrete overpass into a sunlit industrial yard with towering smokestacks and high-voltage power lines, then navigates through narrow streets lined with rusted storage tanks, graffiti-covered concrete walls, and accumulated trash.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial loading bay under concrete overpass

events.description: emerging from under the concrete overpass into the open industrial yard
transitioning from shadow under overpass to bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward from the covered structure toward the open industrial plaza with transmission towers

notable_agents.action: worker in distance walking across the industrial yard

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge overhead framing the view ahead
tall lattice steel tower with multiple power lines
tall chimneys emitting white smoke into the sky
distinctive red painted steel beam framework marking the entrance
large illuminated advertisement screen showing green and red graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete overpass in shadow, looking out toward a bright industrial yard. As the camera moves forward, it emerges into harsh midday sunlight revealing towering smokestacks, a prominent high-voltage transmission tower, and a distinctive red steel framework structure. A lone worker is visible walking in the distance across the asphalt expanse.

events.description: crossing the marked pedestrian crosswalk at the intersection
turning right onto the sidewalk alongside the industrial wall

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk then turning right to follow the sidewalk along the industrial perimeter

notable_agents.action: person in tactical gear crossing the street from left to right
green van parked along the curb near the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall pole with red illuminated signal
cylindrical concrete water tower with metal ladder

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wide industrial intersection under the shadow of the massive transmission tower, passing a red traffic light and a parked green van. After crossing, it turns right onto a sidewalk running alongside a concrete wall, with the digital billboard now visible on the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial service road between storage tanks and retaining walls

events.description: entering the narrow corridor between large cylindrical storage tanks and concrete walls
large industrial truck passes by on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk between massive rusted storage tanks on the right and graffiti-covered concrete walls on the left

notable_agents.action: large industrial truck driving slowly down the narrow road

entered.detail: massive cylindrical steel tanks with rust and graffiti on the surface
metal catwalks and pipes spanning across the street overhead
concrete retaining walls covered in colorful spray paint tags

segments.scene_description: The scene narrows into an industrial corridor flanked by massive rusted storage tanks on the right and graffiti-covered concrete walls on the left. Overhead, metal walkways and pipes crisscross between buildings. A large industrial truck passes slowly on the road as the camera continues walking forward along the cracked concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered industrial alley with trash accumulation

events.description: passing accumulated trash bags and debris piled against the building wall
approaching the end of the alley where the corridor narrows further

agents.ego_description: continuing down the narrow industrial alley, passing yellow dumpsters and piles of trash bags against the teal industrial building on the right

entered.detail: large industrial structure with teal painted walls and heavy graffiti
industrial waste containers with yellow lids lined along the wall
accumulated garbage bags and cardboard debris on the sidewalk
black sign with yellow X symbol mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through a narrow alley lined with a teal industrial building on the right covered in graffiti, and concrete walls on the left. Yellow dumpsters and piles of trash bags accumulate along the sidewalk. The camera passes under overhead pipe bridges and approaches a street sign with a yellow X symbol as the corridor continues into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the deep shadows of a concrete overpass into a sprawling, sun-drenched industrial district that gradually narrows into a gritty urban corridor. It begins in the shade before emerging into harsh midday sunlight, revealing a wide asphalt expanse dominated by towering smokestacks, a high-voltage transmission tower, and a red steel framework. As the camera crosses the intersection past a parked green van, the scene shifts toward a sidewalk where a digital billboard appears against a concrete wall. The environment then tightens into a corridor flanked by massive rusted storage tanks and graffiti-covered walls, with metal walkways and pipes crisscrossing overhead as an industrial truck passes by. Finally, the path narrows further into a teal-walled alley cluttered with yellow dumpsters and trash bags, moving under overhead pipe bridges toward a street sign marked with a yellow X.
